payload.answer: Unable to store article content: fetch failed with 404 network error.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article content as durable memory because the fetch failed with a 404 network error; retain only the failure state and the user intent as a tentative record.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be retrieved, so no durable entity resolution or content extraction is possible.

payload.intent: Remember an article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture.

memory_cards.statement: A request was made to remember the article at https://example.com/missing for its usefulness to memory architecture, but the fetch returned a 404 network error.

details: Mock fetch result indicated 404 network error.
No article content was available to compile into memory.

repair_options: Provide an alternate URL or source.
Store only the request metadata without article content.
